debug_info.goal:
Ω : Type u_1
X : Type u_2
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
A : Ω → Set X
𝓕 : Finset (Set X)
x : X
d : ℕ
isNIPWith_𝓕 : IsNIPWith d ↑𝓕
hA : ∀ᵐ (ω : Ω) ∂μ, A ω ∈ 𝓕
⊢ condVar (MeasurableSpace.generateFrom sorry) (fun ω => (A ω).indicator 1 x) μ ≤ sorry

failed_attempts:
by
  have := isNIPWith_𝓕.finite_shatter _
  simp_all [condVar_le_one]

by
  have h₁ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, (A ω).indicator 1 x = (A ω).indicator 1 x := by
    exact eventually_of_forall (by simp)
  have h₂ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∈ ({0, 1} : Set ℝ) := by
    filter_upwards [hA] with ω hω
    simp [Set.indicator, hω]
  exact condVar_le_of_mem_Icc (by simpa using h₂) (by norm_num) (by norm_num)

by
  have h₁ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, (A ω).indicator 1 x = (A ω).indicator 1 x := by
    exact eventually_of_forall (by simp)
  have h₂ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∈ ({0, 1} : Set ℝ) := by
    filter_upwards [hA] with ω hω
    simp [Set.indicator, hω]
  exact condVar_indicator_le_one_quarter h₂

by
  have h₁ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, (A ω).indicator 1 x = (A ω).indicator 1 x := by
    filter_upwards [hA] with ω hω
    rfl
  rw [condVar_eq_integral_sq_sub_sq_integral]
  refine' le_of_sub_nonneg _
  have h₂ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
    filter_upwards [hA] with ω hω
    exact ⟨by simp [Set.indicator_apply], by simp [Set.indicator_apply]⟩
  have h₃ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, ((A ω).indicator 1 x) ^ 2 ≤ (A ω).indicator 1 x := by
    filter_upwards [hA] with ω hω
    exact by simp [Set.indicator_apply]; cases (x ∈ A ω) <;> simp [*]
  calc
    (∫ ω, ((A ω).indicator 1 x) ^ 2 ∂μ) - (∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ) ^ 2
      ≤ (∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ) - (∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ) ^ 2 := by
        gcongr
        exact_mod_cast h₃
    _ ≤ 1 / 4 := by
      have h₄ : 0 ≤ ∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ ∧ ∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ ≤ 1 := by
        constructor
        · exact integral_nonneg fun ω => by simp [Set.indicator_apply]
        · have : ∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ ≤ ∫ ω, (1 : ℝ) ∂μ := by
            exact integral_mono (by
              filter_upwards [hA] with ω hω
              exact by simp [Set.indicator_apply])
          simpa using this
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ - 1 / 2)]

by
  have h₁ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, (A ω).indicator 1 x = (A ω).indicator 1 x := by
    exact ae_of_all _
  have h₂ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∈ ({0, 1} : Set ℝ) := by
    filter_upwards [hA] with ω hω
    simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Finset.mem_coe, true_or]
    cases' (A ω).indicator 1 x with hx hx <;> simp_all
  exact condVar_indicator_le_one_quarter _ h₂

by
  have h₁ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, (A ω).indicator 1 x = Set.indicator (A ω) (fun _ => 1) x := by
    filter_upwards [hA] with ω hω
    simp [Set.indicator]
  rw [condVar_integral_sub_integral_sq]
  apply le_of_sub_nonneg
  have h₂ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
    filter_upwards [hA] with ω hω
    simp [Set.indicator, Set.mem_Icc]
  have h₃ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, ((A ω).indicator 1 x) ^ 2 ≤ (A ω).indicator 1 x := by
    filter_upwards [hA] with ω hω
    simp [Set.indicator, sq_le_iff]
  calc
    (∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ) - (∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ) ^ 2
      = (∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ) * (1 - ∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ) := by ring
    _ ≤ 1 / 4 := by
      have h₄ : 0 ≤ ∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ ∧ ∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ ≤ 1 := by
        constructor
        · exact integral_nonneg fun ω => by
            obtain hω | hω := (hA.eventually_or hA).mp (by tauto)
            · simp [Set.indicator, hω]
            · simp [Set.indicator, hω]
        · exact (integral_le_of_le_ae (ae_of_all _) fun ω => by
            obtain hω | hω := (hA.eventually_or hA).mp (by tauto)
            · simp [Set.indicator, hω]
            · simp [Set.indicator, hω])
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ - 1 / 2)]

by
  have h₁ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, (A ω).indicator 1 x = Set.indicator (A ω) 1 x := by
    filter_upwards [hA] with ω hω
    simp [Set.indicator]
  rw [condVar_eq_integral_norm_sub_condexp_sq]
  apply le_of_sub_nonneg
  have h₂ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
    filter_upwards [hA] with ω hω
    exact ⟨by simp [Set.indicator], by simp [Set.indicator]⟩
  have h₃ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, 0 ≤ (A ω).indicator 1 x ∧ (A ω).indicator 1 x ≤ 1 := by
    filter_upwards [h₂] with ω hω
    exact ⟨hω.1, hω.2⟩
  have h₄ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, ((A ω).indicator 1 x) ^ 2 ≤ (A ω).indicator 1 x := by
    filter_upwards [h₃] with ω hω
    nlinarith
  calc
    condVar (MeasurableSpace.generateFrom sorry) (fun ω => (A ω).indicator 1 x) μ
      = ∫ ω, ‖(A ω).indicator 1 x - condexp (MeasurableSpace.generateFrom sorry) μ (fun ω => (A ω).indicator 1 x) ω‖ ^ 2 ∂μ := rfl
    _ ≤ 1 / 4 := by
      have h₅ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, condexp (MeasurableSpace.generateFrom sorry) μ (fun ω => (A ω).indicator 1 x) ω ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
        apply ae_condexp_mem_Icc
        · exact h₃.mono fun _ h => h.1
        · exact h₃.mono fun _ h => h.2
      have h₆ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, ‖(A ω).indicator 1 x - condexp (MeasurableSpace.generateFrom sorry) μ (fun ω => (A ω).indicator 1 x) ω‖ ^ 2 ≤ 1 / 4 := by
        filter_upwards [h₃, h₅] with ω hω hω'
        rw [Real.norm_eq_abs]
        have h₇ : |(A ω).indicator 1 x - condexp (MeasurableSpace.generateFrom sorry) μ (fun ω => (A ω).indicator 1 x) ω| ≤ 1 := by
          apply abs_sub_le_iff.mpr
          constructor <;> nlinarith [hω.1, hω.2, hω'.1, hω'.2]
        nlinarith [sq_abs ( (A ω).indicator 1 x - condexp (MeasurableSpace.generateFrom sorry) μ (fun ω => (A ω).indicator 1 x) ω), h₇]
      exact setIntegral_le_of_ae_le_const h₆ (by norm_num)

  have h₁ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, (A ω).indicator 1 x = (A ω).indicator 1 x := by

    rfl
  rw [condVar_eq_integral_sq_sub_sq_integral]
  refine' le_of_sub_nonneg _
  have h₂ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by

    exact ⟨by simp [Set.indicator], by simp [Set.indicator]⟩
  have h₃ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, ((A ω).indicator 1 x) ^ 2 ≤ (A ω).indicator 1 x := by
    filter_upwards [hA] with ω hω
    exact by
      cases' (A ω).indicator 1 x with hx
      · simp_all
      · simp_all
  calc
    (∫ ω, ((A ω).indicator 1 x) ^ 2 ∂μ) - (∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := by
      exact sub_nonneg_of_le (by
        have : (∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ) ^ 2 ≤ ∫ ω, ((A ω).indicator 1 x) ^ 2 ∂μ := by
          exact by
            apply le_of_sub_nonneg
            have : 0 ≤ ∫ ω, ((A ω).indicator 1 x - ∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ) ^ 2 ∂μ := by
              apply integral_nonneg
              intro ω
              exact sq_nonneg _
            simpa using this
        exact this)
    _ ≤ 1 / 4 := by
      have : (∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ) ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by

            · simp_all

            · exact h₂
            · intro ω
              exact by
                cases' (A ω).indicator 1 x with hx
                · simp_all
                · simp_all
          simpa using this
      have : (∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ) * (1 - ∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ) ≤ 1 / 4 := by
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (∫ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x ∂μ - 1 / 2)]
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm] using this
